outline.title: On Printmaking
outline.description: Long conversations with printmakers about plates, presses, and patience.

outline.title: The Slow Studio
outline.description: Working artists on process, attention, and the long arc of a practice.

outline.title: Riverfront Field Notes
outline.description: Walking, gathering, and the industrial edges of American cities.

outline.title: After Hours Jazz
outline.description: Quiet sets and liner notes. Coltrane, Monk, and the cool corners of the catalogue.

outline.title: Ambient and Minimal
outline.description: Long-form listening for the studio. No words when the press is running.

outline.title: French at the Table
outline.description: Conversational French, slowly, for reading source texts and travel.

outline.title: The Visible Page
outline.description: Essays and memoir, close readings of objects, memory, and looking.
